title: 名物カメラマンの注文

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text: Yaaass, honey! City, you are gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Should we do another angle?

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's do more! For the next scene, can we see
a stunning run beside the waves?

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
I love it! I love it! Absolutely gorgeous! ♪ Let's
keep the flow going! The next one is...

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaand we are done! Good job! ☆ You can look
forward to the finished product! ♪

Having lost themselves in the moment, the
photographer and Gold City keep going longer
than planned. In the end, she's exhausted.
